name: Sugar Mess - Let's Play Jolly Battle

reviews.review_description: I played this game and I loved it, but if I would've listened to the person who did the play through i would've missed it! He didn't have enough room to get the game to play, so he chose not to recommend the game because of his sma room and that's not far to the developer or the community. I love this game as a 61 year old grandms so I give it 5 stars 🌟 ⭐⭐⭐⭐

This game is a solid experience from start to finish. The graphics, gameplay mechanics, and overall immersion really stand out. Whether you’re new to VR or experienced, it’s easy to jump in and enjoy. Definitely one of those titles that keeps you coming back for more. Highly recommend checking it out—especially if you’re looking for something fun and engaging.
Simply fun!  As an adult this is a fun game.  Would be great for kids also.

I haven't played in a while. I tried to play the game yesterday and all I can do now is play the tutorial. Then it goes to the main room and it doesn't let me do anything. I'm just stuck looking down at the diorama in front of me. I can't move in the room. I can't interact to activate anything to play. I know it used to work. The book glows across the room in corner but I can't get to it or pull to me. The tablet attached to right of diorama does nothing. It's possible I just forgot to how to get the levels of game to actually start but if that is the case then the game is poorly built. It should either be intuitive or the tutorial should actually cover that. My system is up to date. No updates pending.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for sharing your feedback with us!
We’ve carefully checked the situation on our side, and everything seems to be functioning as expected.
To activate the DLC content and gain access to the Shop, you first need to finish the tutorial and complete one level from the game board in front of you.
The next step is to start your first level by placing the statue on the button on the table in front of you. The statue, which is situated on the upper left side of the main table (levels progression area), has a white outline and a sound effect. 
It’s possible that the game didn’t clearly guide you through this step, and we really appreciate you letting us know. Your feedback is valuable and will help us improve the experience for everyone.
If you’d like, we can continue the conversation on our Discord server — this will help us better understand what happened on your side and support you faster: https://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb

Thank you again for your time and for playing Sugar Mess!

reviews.review_description: Sugar Mess is a charming VR experience with beautifully stylized visuals and a playful, storybook-like world full of candy and color. The gameplay mixes light shooting, rhythm challenges, and simple puzzles in a way that feels fresh and well-paced. Difficulty is well balanced, making it fun for both kids and adults. It’s a short but sweet adventure, perfect for a quick, feel-good session on Meta Quest.

developer_response.body: We really appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts and are happy to hear you had a good experience with the game.

reviews.review_title: A Sweet addition to your library
reviews.review_description: This game is very impressive visually.  The vibrancy of the environments is absolutely gorgeous and manages to be cute at the same time.  The gameplay is simple enough to pick up easily, and the functions of the controller are well adjusted.  It's fun, and you will have a smile on your face the whole time you're playing. Don't be fooled by the cuteness. It's still challenging, but even as I lose,  I laugh..... it can't be helped.  It's also great that it can be played sitting down! This game can be enjoyed by everyone in the family.... all ages will enjoy this hit!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re so happy to hear it brings smiles. That really means a lot to us!

reviews.review_title: Whimsical, Fun, and Full of Sweetness
reviews.review_description:
Sugar Mess is a delightful game that feels like stepping into a whimsical carnival. It combines the playful challenge of a carnival-style shooter with the colorful, candy-filled charm of Candy Crush. The result is a lighthearted and engaging experience that’s easy to enjoy.

The visuals are particularly well done—bright, cute, and inviting, without ever feeling overwhelming or scary. The design creates a cheerful atmosphere that makes the game accessible for players of all ages.

What makes this game stand out is not only how fun it is, but also how it enhances the mind-body connection. The gameplay naturally improves hand-eye coordination while keeping you moving and focused, making it great for players of all ages who want both entertainment and a bit of wellness benefit.

The game also follows a fun storyline, and the developers have cleverly expanded it with DLC packs that add more content, environments, and challenges—keeping the experience fresh and exciting.

Overall, Sugar Mess is a charming and creative — that puts a smile on your face. I’m genuinely looking forward to what these developers create next in their whimsical world. A big thank you to the team for bringing such sweetness and fun into the gaming world!

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you so much for such a thoughtful review! It means a lot to hear that the game brings both fun and a bit of wellness, and we’re so glad you’re enjoying the extra content too. Your kind words truly inspire our team to keep creating more sweetness and joy for players!

reviews.review_description: I bought this game during the flash sale only to support the developers because I think their Match 3 game is wonderful - and WOW this game is so nice looking and polished! I really loved the story telling with the book and popup 2d graphics. Despite the joyful cute graphics playing the game on normal difficulty was challenging but there's a setting to change it to easy. Reloading your gun is easy you grab a ball of jelly and put it in your gun, I found it was helpful to keep a ball of jelly in my hand so when I was out of ammo I could immediately reload, then count to 5 before grabbing the next one. There's a progression system so as you earn coins you can unlock better weapons. There's a cute arcade machine where you have to press the buttons using your hands. So many quest games feel a bit janky at times but this was smooth... great fun to play seated!

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a thoughtful review!  We’re happy you enjoyed the storybook style, gameplay, and smooth experience. Your support means a lot, and we’re so glad you had fun (and found your perfect reload strategy).

reviews.review_description:
The atmosphere in Sugar Mess is absolutely charming, with a beautifully stylized environment that pulls you right into its colourful world. It's clear that a lot of thought and love went into the story. Everything feels carefully crafted and wonderfully imaginative. The rhythm-based levels were my favorite part by far. Smashing objects to the beat of the music was incredibly fun and satisfying:D I also really appreciated the excellent Czech translation.
Highly recommend for anyone looking for a joyful VR adventure!

developer_response.body: We’re so happy you enjoyed your time in our colorful world! The rhythm levels were a blast to make, and we’re glad they hit the right beat for you. Big thanks for appreciating the Czech translation too, it means a lot!

reviews.review_description: This is such a fun game, it's colorful and highly addictive. Those boss battles are challenging, and I love it! ❤️

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We loved creating those challenging boss battles and are glad you enjoy the sweet feeling of victory!

reviews.review_description: *Sugar Mess: Let's Play Jolly Battle* on Quest 3 is a fun, colourful game perfect for all ages. Players defend a candy kingdom using easy-to-learn shooting mechanics while exploring exciting levels like rollercoaster rides and rhythm challenges. With its bright visuals, playful action, and family-friendly gameplay, it’s a sweet and entertaining VR adventure everyone can enjoy. 10/10

developer_response.body: We’re happy to know you had fun in Sugar Mess - Let's Play Jolly Battle! Thanks for highlighting the colorful world and playful gameplay!

reviews.review_title: We had joy! We had fun!
reviews.review_description: I wouldn’t have imagined this game would get me so hooked! The animations are fantastic, the storytelling and table view are both interesting and beautifully designed, and the playability is top-notch. I was very impressed with the attention to detail, the pacing of the enemies—which keeps you engaged and striving to do your best—and the overall smoothness of the game. Absolutely perfect!

developer_response.body: We’re so glad Sugar Mess - Let's Play Jolly Battle kept you hooked! It’s great to hear the animations, story, and smooth gameplay hit the right note. Your feedback about the pacing and detail means a lot!

reviews.review_description: Great game for the whole family! It’s super easy to figure out the controls, so both kids and adults can jump right in. The graphics are bright and fun, and the gameplay keeps everyone entertained. No glitches or issues, everything runs perfectly. For family fun in VR, this is the perfect pick. 5 out of 5, highly recommend!

reviews.review_title: Sweet, Simple, and So Much Fun! 🍬🎮
reviews.review_description: The bright, colorful graphics make it a treat to play, and the gameplay is just plain fun – you’ll be fending off goofy, candy-themed enemies that shatter when you hit them. Whether you’re playing solo or with the family, it’s a guaranteed good time. Highly recommend it for some sweet, stress-free gaming! 🚀🔥

reviews.review_title: Great fun gem of a game.
reviews.review_description: I enjoyed playing this game even though I don't think it was aimed at my age range but I think others will get absolutely more of a blast out of it.

reviews.review_title: Sweet Chaos in VR: A Fun and Colorful Ad
reviews.review_description: Sugar Mess is a fun and colorful VR game, perfect for family entertainment. The gameplay is a mix of shooting, puzzles, and rhythm games, while the visual style delights with vibrant colors and cute characters. The levels are diverse, with exciting minecart rides and boss fights standing out. However, the game isn’t too challenging and feels a bit short. But if you're looking for a lighthearted and enjoyable VR experience, it's a great choice!
This is a fun cute front frustum based shooter. Good story telling wraps a deceptively difficult shooting game. Had quite a bit of fun!

Nice to see a beautifully designed game, polished, nicely worked and with funny characters!

It's got a story too! It sends you to Candy Land,  putting you in the middle of the plot!

It's simple and enjoyable! 🍭

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! :)

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love my FPS and scary games but this one really surprised me.  I did what a lot of people probably do and see the cartoon graphics and say "not for me". The devs did supply me with a key but that has nothing to do with the way I felt.  It has everything from on rail shooter to puzzles and boss battles.  A nice little story as well for the younger ones.   If you have a family and love to compete then grab this game.   I did give it 4 stars as I felt like some of the levels could of been a tad shorter.  There were some slow areas and long areas.  Also I believe a great narrator reading the lines of the book could of amped it up s little more. Overall very fun game.

reviews.review_title: What Can I Say About This Game
reviews.review_description: SO MUCH!!! Super cute game. It's like you fell into candyland and they are mad!! Nice having a shooter game that's not blood and guts.  At least for me I get bored of wave games. This one however breaks that up with little puzzles and other activities. Very refreshing.  The colors are very vibrant and the controllers are very responsive. I have only had this game For 2 days and can tell the passion that went into making this game by the developers.  (And not just a cash cow) Can't wait for more levels and I just started!! I do have to also say it hurts this older lady's soul getting taken out by a piece of gum or a walking jelly roll!!🤭😂 Well done developers! I'd give more stars if I could! Keep up the wonderful work!

it's super fun but too short. also if I can request, the roller coaster part is a bit uncomfortable for me personally. if there is an option to make that part just a straight line without any turn that would be great ❤️

Is this game a Tower Defense Shooter? Yes!
Is this game an On-the Rails Shooter? Yes!
Is this game a Puzzle Game? Yes!
Is this game a Rhythm Game? Yes!
Is this game ridiculously infectious? Yes Yes Yes!

A truly wonderful experience, lovingly crafted by the Developer/Developers, graphically endearing, challenging gameplay, a genre hopping VR game par excellence.

I played the demo around 6 months ago and instantly thought that there was the potential for a really good game, now playing the full version I am constantly suprised by how good it is, the storybook interface is one of the best VR mechanics I've come across so far.

Highly recommended, an easy 5 star rating.

developer_response.body: Thanks for a such detailed feedback! :) Don't forget to try out the update ;)

reviews.review_description: So this is a cutesy title.  Don’t be fooled by the cartoony looks this is for big kids.  Its colorful, bright and fast fun.  You have to have your wits about you and its easy to enjoy looking around at the visuals and forget to shoot at everything that moves.  Reload is and refill on health is really easy and fast which helps the gameplay feel smooth.  It also has a story you follow through a pop up flip book which is the first time I have seen that in a VR game, although for me I did tend to skip to move on to the game play, but that’s just me and my style of gaming…As you go around the levels they play differently one was on a cart so for me I was glad I was sat down as you did get a feeling of motion, although I did not need my VR legs thankfully I was ok and prior to each level start there were tips which were very handy.  This is a fun title to buy and highly rated for a reason.

This is a fun waver shooter with extra minigames. It's easy to pickup and has great graphics music and an easy to use gameplay system. 

With the added mini games makes this a great game for all. 

Shoot your way through the levels upgrade your guns and enjoy the story that goes with it.

Full video review on my YouTube channel.

I’ve only just begun this game and there are a variety of game modes to play, from shooting to puzzles, to rhythm games, it’s a fun, family friendly game. I can’t wait to see what other game modes I’ll unlock!

I'm not very good with shooter games but this one was extremely fun! Its very well made, the scenarios are colorful and pretty, and the story's artwork is suuper cool too! I just finished my first boss and had a great time. The story is engaging and it even has an arcade game!!!! Its super well done and I can see it was a game made with passion! I highly recommend getting it!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! It means very much for our team :)

reviews.review_title: Sugar Mess: A journey through memories
reviews.review_description: A highly enjoyable game that reminds me a lot of the games that i used to play in my childhood, with wonderfully crafted candy aesthetics and a unique and engaging musical style. Even the storytelling is extremely detailed and well-executed. 10/10.

developer_response.body: Yeah, that's the point! Thanks ;)

reviews.review_description:
*Sugar Mess VR Game Review*

I recently had the chance to play Sugar Mess VR on my Meta Quest, and I must say, it's been an incredible experience! The game's overall experience is absolutely amazing, and I highly recommend it to everyone.

The gameplay is engaging, interactive, and ridiculously fun! You'll find yourself fully immersed in a colorful world, surrounded by sweet treats and messy situations. The controls are intuitive, making it easy to navigate and interact with the environment.

The graphics are stunning, with vibrant colors and detailed textures that make the game world feel alive. The visuals are crisp and clear, even in fast-paced moments, which adds to the overall sense of immersion.

What sets Sugar Mess VR apart is its unique blend of creativity, humor, and challenge. You'll laugh, you'll cry (from laughing too hard), and you'll be eager to play more.

If you're looking for a VR game that's fun, entertaining, and visually stunning, look no further than Sugar Mess VR. Trust me, you won't regret it!

Rating: 5/5 stars

This is awesome fun
I love it's simplicity but don't take my word for it 
Just buy it

"Sugar Mess – Let’s Play Jolly Battle is certainly an ambitious title as it attempts to fuse a variety of gameplay styles together, and succeeds for the most part. It doesn’t quite nail any of them, but it’s at least competent enough to make it a short but sweet experience."
Read the full review on The Elite Institute

Very fun and wholesome adventure, I love how the interactions were done, it was very cute! The loading tips were also very appreciated for the gameplay and helped out! Shooting feels pretty satisfying and I really like the way you reload and heal!

developer_response.body: Thanks! Stay tuned as more fun levels and modes are ahead :)

reviews.review_description: Love the cute art style. The gameplay is easy to learn and satisfying . I realy like  the interactions in the menu !

developer_response.body: Thanks! ;)

reviews.review_description:
This is a sweat fun shooting game. It is a shame you can't eat all those sweeties, but it is a cutie world ! 
The variety of weapons and enemies makes it not always an easy task to master, and not boring at all. As an arcade game, it is just a matter of you get used to it. All the family likes to play it at home !
So enjoy the sweetness without getting fat, and shoot them all baby !

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! Have fun with your whole family while playing Sugar Mess! :)

reviews.review_description: It's a shooter game, but it has a super nice story, really wonderful visuals and it's fun and well done! I definitely recommend it

developer_response.body: Thanks! Stay tuned for more fun updates ahead ;)

reviews.review_title: A Fun Addition to Everyone's VR Library
reviews.review_description:
Sugar Mess is a well-thought-out arcade shooter that is approachable and fun to master. 

I'm looking forward to eradicating my current top scores once I can afford to get my sticky mitts on the better boom sticks.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback!
We believe that you can improve your score on each level! Have fun ;)

reviews.review_description: Game is worth playing, it is on the competitive side of shooting, story and cute characters, also comes with an arcade I mean what else do you need it’s all there!

developer_response.body: Cool that you enjoyed all the fun features in the game! Stay tuned for more cool things coming soon :)

reviews.review_title: Crushing Candies can be really fun!
reviews.review_description: Sugarmess Jolly Battle is a hidden gem. From the moment I started playing Sugarmess Jolly Battle, I was hooked. It’s tougher than it looks, which keeps it interesting. Definitely worth checking out!
Good game, funny, nice story, interesting levels, but short... please more content / levels

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Stay tuned, because we are coming soon with more fun levels, multiplayer and sweet weapons!

reviews.review_description:
Cute and visually pleasing. 
Surprisingly good arcade shooter that’s not as easy as it looks.

Pleasantly surprised. First impression was this is just a kids game. It is very stimulating in the cartoonish kind of way. Tracking and shooting at moving targets was more difficult than I had anticipated. The creators did a very good job with this game. The game is simple and easy to have fun with.well done.
